scripts.lint: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run-many -t lint --all
scripts.typecheck: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run-many -t typecheck --all
scripts.test: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run-many -t test --all
scripts.build: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run-many -t build --all
scripts.test:integration:core-api: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run core-api:test:integration
scripts.test:integration:testcontainers: RUN_TESTCONTAINERS=true NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run core-api:test:testcontainers
scripts.api:advanced:check: pnpm run test:integration:core-api && pnpm run postman:smoke && pnpm run arazzo:verify && pnpm run pact:verify
scripts.api:advanced:check:full: pnpm run api:advanced:check && pnpm run test:integration:testcontainers
scripts.check: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx run-many -t lint,typecheck,test,build --all && pnpm run openapi:lint && pnpm run workflow:artifacts:check && pnpm run ai:guard
scripts.affected: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false pnpm nx affected -t lint,typecheck,test,build
